title: Add Docker deployment with GHCR and Watchtower
body:
This PR adds a complete Docker-based deployment setup for the KNX Web App.

## Changes:
- Add GitHub Actions workflow for multi-arch Docker builds (linux/amd64, linux/arm64)
- Add docker-compose.prod.yml for production deployments using prebuilt GHCR images
- Add docker-compose.yml for local development
- Add healthchecks and graceful shutdown for both services
- Add README-DEPLOY.md with complete setup instructions
- Add setup-watchtower.sh for automated updates
- Update frontend and backend code to use environment variables
- Add .dockerignore files for cleaner builds

## Usage:
After merging, GitHub Actions will automatically build and publish Docker images to GHCR.

On the VPS, run:
```bash
chmod +x setup-watchtower.sh
./setup-watchtower.sh
```

Or manually:
```bash
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
```

Watchtower will automatically check for new images every 5 minutes and update the containers.
head: docker-deployment
